canonical_definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework for Qur’anic Tafsir featuring Ayat-Ontology chunking, designed to evaluate verse-level retrieval and question answering using structured ontological context.
papers: Automated Knowledge Graph Construction using Large Language Models and Sentence Complexity Modelling
